channel.title: Tools on 维唯为为
channel.description: Recent content in Tools on 维唯为为

item.title: A Practical Ghostty-Based Terminal Stack
item.description: A practical macOS terminal stack built around Ghostty, JetBrainsMono Nerd Font, zinit, Starship, zoxide, fzf, Yazi, and modern CLI tools, focused on startup performance, readability, history preservation, and reproducible setup.
